nodes.name: 脊索动物门

nodes.name: Barred wren-warbler
nodes.summary: The barred wren-warbler or southern barred warbler (Calamonastes fasciolatus) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Namibia, Botswana, western Angola, northern South Africa and southwestern Zimbabwe. Its natural habitat is dry savanna. References External links Barred (wren) warbler - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
